testcase.classname: usePaymentPolling transitions to success on confirmed status
testcase.name: usePaymentPolling transitions to success on confirmed status

testcase.classname: usePaymentPolling stops and shows error on failed status
testcase.name: usePaymentPolling stops and shows error on failed status

testcase.classname: usePaymentPolling shows generic error when failed with no error_message
testcase.name: usePaymentPolling shows generic error when failed with no error_message

testcase.classname: usePaymentPolling surfaces error_message from API when present during confirming
testcase.name: usePaymentPolling surfaces error_message from API when present during confirming

testcase.classname: usePaymentPolling times out after MAX_POLL_MS and shows timeout message
testcase.name: usePaymentPolling times out after MAX_POLL_MS and shows timeout message
